title: On-Device vs Cloud LLM Energy Cost
scenario: Generating 50 tokens using an on-device 7B model takes 2.5 seconds at 5W (NPU + Memory). Alternatively, an API call to a cloud server takes 0.5s of 5G active radio time at 2.0W, followed by 1.0s of idle waiting for the response at 0.5W. The cloud server itself consumes 0.05 Joules per token. Compare

title: Dynamic Batching on IoT Edge Gateways
scenario: A smart home edge gateway processes security camera frames at 10 frames per second. Unbatched (Option A): Processing 1 frame takes 50ms at 3.0W. Batched (Option B): Waiting to batch 5 frames takes 200ms total at 3.5W (better vectorization efficiency). When not processing, the gateway sleeps at 0.5W.
